results.rendered_html:
arus (von ar 6.)  Uṇ. 2,113 .
1〉 adj. wund  ŚAT. BR. 3,1,3,7 . aruṣkṛta verwundet: krūrīkṛteva hi bhavatyaruṣkṛtā 13,3,7,6 . Vgl. anarus, wo te evaitadanaruṣkaroti yadakṣyāvānakti zu lesen ist.
— 2〉 n. Wunde  AK. 2,6,2,5 .  H. 465 . yaddaṇḍena yadiṣvā yadvārurharasā kṛtam  AV. 5,5,4 .  ŚAT. BR. 3,1,3,10 . dakṣiṇārus an der rechten Seite verwundet  AK. 2,10,24 .
— 3〉 indecl. Gelenk  UṆĀDIK. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. aru.

results.rendered_html:
arus a. [ṛ-us  Uṇ. 2. 116 ] Wounded, sore.
— m.
— (ruḥ)
1 The Arka tree.
2 Red Khadira.
— n.
1 A vital part.
2 A wound, sore (
— m. also).
3 An eye.
Comp.
— kara a. [arus-kṛ-ṭaḥ  P. III. 2. 21 ] causing or inflicting wounds, wounding.
— (raḥ) N. of a tree aruṣka q. v.
— (raṃ) the nut of this tree.
— kṛta a. wounded, hurt.
